# exasol_schema (Resource)

Creates, renames and drops an Exasol schema.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "exasol_schema" "analytics" {
  name = "ANALYTICS"
}

# Schema with ownership transfer
resource "exasol_schema" "staging" {
  name  = "STAGING"
  owner = exasol_role.etl_role.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Schema name to create or rename to.

### Optional

- `owner` (String) Schema owner (user or role). If specified, ownership will be transferred after creation.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Current schema name (used as Terraform ID).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import exasol_schema.analytics ANALYTICS
```
